reviews.comment:
Esta reseña está modificada.... contexto: los califique en Google con 2 estrellas por que en varias ocasiones anteriores los baños estaban cerrados ... y por que con las promos de desayuno solo daban jugo campagnola de manzana siendo que tenían más variedad de sabor en otra marca, y por que (para mi) no accedieron a cambiarme el jugo de manzana por otro de otra marca, por que tenian un millon de jugo de manzana y estaban a Dias de vencerse... una boludes sinceramente..., ni bien termine de hacer la reseña apareció un gerente supongo, lo cual me parece perfecto, preguntándome si yo era el de la reseña y si podía indicarle que día yo fui para ver por que los baños estaban cerrados ya que eso no debería pasar... le conteste y se fue... yo seguí con lo mio... incluso abrí el jugo con el sorbete y comencé a tomarlo... vino la señora que atiende ahi y me trato de mentiroso adelante de todo el bar por que supuestamente  yo había escrito en la reseña que el jugo estaba a 10 días de vencerse, lo cual no es así, y agarro mi jugo y me señaló la fecha de vencimiento tocando la caja y remarcando con su dedo... yo no tengo problemas con la higiene y esas cosas, me como las cosas del piso, pero NO PODES TOCARLE EL ALIMENTO ABIERTO A ALGUIEN QUE ESTA COMIENDO... y menos hacerle pasar el momento incomodo de tratarlo de mentiroso frente a toda la clientela... osea, si reseñas algo malo, te van a hacer sentir incomodo para que te vayas...y acá admito que leí mal la fecha de vencimiento... pensé que estaba a 30 días de vencerse y estaba realmente a 60... de igual forma, nunca especifique la cantidad de días, y no corresponde tratar de mentiroso al cliente mientras se está tomando el café

(Translated by Google)
This review has been modified.... Context: I gave them a 2-star rating on Google because on several previous occasions the restrooms were closed... and because with the breakfast specials they only gave out Campagnola apple juice, even though they had a wider variety of flavors in another brand, and because (in my opinion) they wouldn't exchange the apple juice for another brand, because they had a million bottles of apple juice and they were about to expire... a stupid thing to do, honestly... As soon as I finished writing the review, a manager appeared, which I suppose is fine, asking me if I was the one who wrote the review and if I could tell him what day I went so he could see why the restrooms were closed, since that shouldn't happen... I answered him and he left... I continued with what I was doing... I even opened the juice with the straw and started drinking it... the lady who works there came over and called me a liar in front of the whole bar because supposedly I had written in the review that the juice was 10 days from expiring, which isn't true, and she grabbed my He was giving me juice and pointed to the expiration date by touching the box and tracing it with his finger... I don't have a problem with hygiene and all that, I'll eat things off the floor, but YOU CAN'T TOUCH OPEN FOOD WHILE SOMEONE IS EATING... and even less make them go through the awkward moment of being called a liar in front of all the customers... I mean, if you give a bad review, they're going to make you feel uncomfortable so you'll leave... and here I admit I misread the expiration date... I thought it was 30 days from expiring and it was actually 60... anyway, I never specified the number of days, and it's not right to call a customer a liar while they're having their coffee
